calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-09-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Ivy Tseng, Esq. appeared for plaintiff SFGC Associates, LLC.
Mark D'Amborsi, Property Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant George Bilemdjian, dba Prestige Casting.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on October 20, 2009.

Exhibit 1--Lease Agreement dated May 22, 2006----------------------------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff SFCGC Associates, LLC, and against defendant George Bilemdjian, dba Prestige Casting as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $5,478.12.
Holdover Damages - $5,377.40.
Attorney Fees - $500.00.
Costs - $280.00.
Total - $11,635.52.

Additionally, plaintiff SFGC Associates, LLC are entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 888 Brannan Street, #4200 & #4205, San Francisco, CA 94103. The rental agreement is canceled.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-09-2009 Assigned To Trial Court
